description_long: This object appears as a highly abstract, distorted humanoid form with elongated, jagged limbs and angular protrusions extending in multiple directions. The central mass suggests a torso, with two main appendages resembling arms and two others possibly representing legs, though all are stretched and fragmented. The surface is a mix of dark and light tones, with sharp, blade-like extensions that give the figure a dynamic, almost chaotic appearance. There is a rounded form near the center that could be interpreted as a head, but facial features are not discernible. The overall structure is thin and spindly, with large gaps between the appendages, making the figure appear fragile and insubstantial. The visual style is reminiscent of a digital glitch or a stylized, deconstructed sculpture.
description: A highly abstract, fragmented humanoid figure with elongated, jagged limbs and a spindly, chaotic form. The object features sharp extensions and a central mass suggesting a torso and head.
description_view_0: From this angle, the jagged, elongated limbs and the central mass are most prominent, with sharp extensions radiating outward.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the thinness of the form and the dramatic length of the appendages, with the central mass appearing more compressed.
description_view_2: Here, the angular protrusions and fragmented limbs are seen intersecting, highlighting the chaotic, abstract nature of the figure.
description_view_3: This perspective shows the rounded central form, possibly a head, and the spindly limbs extending away from the body.
attribute_clothing_type: abstract, unidentifiable clothing or body form with no discernible garments
attribute_posture: distorted, fragmented standing or dynamic pose
